strategy: She counters almost everything with an AoE Moon Insane Bolt (550/1,050/1,550), so plan to kill in as few actions as possible and keep the team's health buffered.
Skip blades and Globals (she answers with AoE Enfeeble or a self-heal), Feints (double Insane Bolt), DoTs (she casts Kraken), damage debuffs (Hammer of Thor), and Dissipate (Insane Bolt).
Set up with Auras and at most one trap instead, since those are your only quiet tools.
She resists all schools 40% and self-pierces 60%, so bring raw damage and accuracy rather than a stacked charm setup.
Enter on time (late is a free Insane Bolt), then land one big single hit and heal through the counter.
cheatNotes: Join late and she opens with an AoE Moon Insane Bolt (550/1,050/1,550) — always enter on time.
Whenever she has a heal-over-time up she casts Thundering Jinn at the end of the round — don't let her sit on a HoT.
Any damage to her triggers an AoE Moon Insane Bolt (up to 1,550) — minimize your number of hits and keep the team healthy for the counter.
A DoT on her makes her cast Kraken — use direct damage, not damage-over-time.
Blades and Globals make her AoE-Enfeeble the team or heal herself — set up with Auras instead of charms or globals.
Damage debuffs on her trigger Hammer of Thor — don't Weaken or debuff her.
Feint makes her double up: Insane Bolt then an AoE Moon Insane Bolt — skip Feint entirely.
Dissipate also triggers an AoE Insane Bolt — leave it out of your deck.
